action.command:
cd /workspace/YatCC && python3 -c "
# Let me check what ANTLR actually sees by looking at the token positions
# I'll add some debug output to the lexer

# Actually, let me just check the raw bytes of the preprocessed file
with open('build/test/task0/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c', 'rb') as f:
    content = f.read()
    print(f'File size: {len(content)} bytes')
    print(f'First 100 bytes: {content[:100]}')
    print(f'Bytes 200-257: {content[200:]}')"
